{{CargoClone
|name=Ninja Fuma
|rank=purple
|cabin=2
|id=51
|gene1={race} RUSH +30
|gene2={race} FAME +30
|gene3=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:
> Troop RUSH +8
|gene4=Per 10% HP lost, {race} RUSH +40
|gene5=Per 30 Dragon Minions in battle:
> Troop RUSH +12
|gene6=Per 10% HP lost, {race} RUSH +60
|}}
